votes.rationale: Progress state is already computed deterministically, but operators still have to manually route themselves to the next panel task. Adding progress filters, queue links, and next-action guidance improves throughput without changing scoring or governance semantics.
Scope is bounded to operator workflow UX on top of existing panel progress logic. Risk is low because the motion does not alter selection semantics, scaffold behavior, or completion rules.
Unanimous consent satisfied. The change is isolated, reversible, and improves operator dispatch from coverage to panels while preserving deterministic panel state semantics.
